---
title: "overlap_add"
generated: true
description: "Normalise an accumulated overlap-add."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.spatial`](../nitrix-numerics-spatial.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:overlap_add -->
```python
overlap_add(weighted_sum: Float[Array, '...'], weight: Float[Array, '...'], *, eps: float = 1e-08) -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:overlap_add -->
Normalise an accumulated overlap-add.

Computes the weighted mean
$\mathrm{weighted\_sum} / \max(\mathrm{weight}, \epsilon)$,
the finalisation step of weighted patch stitching. The orchestrator
accumulates `weighted_sum += w * patch` and `weight += w` over the
tiles, and `eps` guards voxels that no patch covered.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:overlap_add -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `weighted_sum` | `Float` | `...` | — | Accumulated sum of `weight * patch` contributions over all tiles. |
| `weight` | `Float` | `...` | — | Accumulated sum of the patch weights over all tiles, broadcast- compatible with `weighted_sum`. |
| `eps` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Lower bound on the denominator, guarding voxels covered by no patch (zero accumulated weight). Defaults to `1e-8`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. The normalised overlap-add, with the shape of the broadcast of `weighted_sum` and `weight`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:overlap_add -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
